2008-oopsla-dtar.description: QUAIL introduces deep typechecking to ensure dynamic query safety and simplify refactoring in systems combining Java code with a database backend.

2012-security-quark.description: Quark is a web browser kernel formally verified in Coq to ensure tab non-interference, cookie integrity, and address bar security via formal shim verification.

2019-conga-sinkingpoint.description: Sinking-point extends arbitrary digital number systems to dynamically track precision and help identify results with high error with few false positives.

2022-ecoop-cakemlfp.description: RealCake extends CakeML with verified fast-math-style optimizations, enabling end-to-end correctness by relating abstract real-number semantics to concrete I/O semantics.

2023-plarch-lakeroad.description: Generate Compilers from Hardware Models! - PLARCH @ PLDI 2023

2023-popl-babble.description: LLMT, a new library learning algorithm implemented in our tool 'babble', efficiently identifies common patterns in code corpora via anti-unification to improve both compression and scalability.
